name: EVgo Inc.
description: EVgo Inc. owns and operates a direct current fast charging network in the United States. The company offers electricity directly to drivers through its public charging network, as well as provides charging solutions for private and public fleets. It also offers various services such as EVgo Optii, a cloud-based software platform for fleet charging management, and EVgo eXtend, a service that provides hardware, software, and maintenance for third-party owned charging sites. EVgo's network includes over 950 fast charging locations across more than 35 states, serving over one million customer accounts.
